prd_creation_to_wireframe.description: Default path — user chose to build wireframes before implementation.

conditions.description: PRD file must exist
conditions.check: features[active_feature].prd_path exists as a file

conditions.description: PRD must have required frontmatter fields
PRD must have required sections
User chose to proceed with wireframing (default path).
conditions.check: features[active_feature].wireframe_skipped is not true

prd_creation_to_branch_creation.description: Skip path — user chose to skip wireframing and go directly to branch creation + PRD splitting + implementation. Orchestra MUST ask the user via the ask tool after PRD creation before taking this path. When taken, no wireframe branch is created, no wireframe PR is opened, and feature branch is created directly from the base branch (develop/development).

conditions.description: PRD file must exist
conditions.check: features[active_feature].prd_path exists as a file

conditions.description: PRD must have required frontmatter fields
PRD must have required sections
User explicitly chose to skip wireframing — captured via orchestra's ask tool and recorded in workflow state.
conditions.check: features[active_feature].wireframe_skipped === true

conditions.description: At least one wireframe directory must exist with a .tsx file
conditions.check: Each wireframe in features[active_feature].wireframes has a directory with ≥1 .tsx file

conditions.description: Each wireframe must have a metadata.json
conditions.check: metadata.json exists in each wireframe directory

conditions.description: Must be on wireframe branch
conditions.check: Current branch is wireframe/<worker>/vc-<slug> and all wireframe changes are committed

conditions.description: Wireframe PR must exist targeting develop
conditions.check: features[active_feature].wireframe_pr_url is set and `gh pr view` succeeds

conditions.description: Wireframe PR must be merged by FE owners
conditions.check: `gh pr view <wireframe_pr_url> --json state` returns 'MERGED'

conditions.description: Jeff must have approved the wireframe (verbal or PR comment)
conditions.check: All wireframes in features[active_feature].wireframes have approval.status === 'approved'

conditions.description: Must be on base branch first, then feature branch created from it. Base branch is develop for api/web, development for ai-service/data-service.
conditions.check: Agent has: (1) checked out base branch, (2) pulled latest, (3) (only if wireframe was NOT skipped) verified wireframe files exist on develop, (4) created feature/<worker>/vc-<slug> from base branch

conditions.description: Wireframe files must exist on develop when wireframe phase was used. If features[active_feature].wireframe_skipped === true, skip this check.
conditions.check: features[active_feature].wireframe_skipped === true OR web/src/app/(dashboard)/wireframes/<slug>/ exists on current branch

conditions.description: Service PRDs must exist for each touched service
conditions.check: features[active_feature].service_prds has entries for all services listed in main PRD frontmatter

conditions.description: Must be on feature branch
conditions.check: Current branch is feature/<worker>/vc-<slug>

implementation_to_pr_submission.description: Sequential flow only (Cursor/OpenCode). Agent Teams skips pr_submission/pr_review.

conditions.description: Track file must show progress
conditions.check: At least one task checked off in each service's track file

conditions.description: Must be on feature branch
conditions.check: Current branch is feature/<worker>/vc-<slug>

conditions.description: Must be using sequential strategy
conditions.check: agent_teams is null OR agent_teams.strategy === 'sequential'

implementation_to_completion.description: Agent Teams flow only (Claude Code). Engineers handle their own PRs — skip pr_submission/pr_review.

conditions.description: Must be using agent_teams strategy
conditions.check: agent_teams.strategy === 'agent_teams'

conditions.description: All engineers must report done
conditions.check: Every entry in agent_teams.engineers has status === 'done'

conditions.description: All service PRs must exist and be merged
conditions.check: Every service in pr_urls has a URL and `gh pr view` returns 'MERGED'

conditions.description: PR URLs must be recorded and exist on GitHub
conditions.check: features[active_feature].pr_urls has at least one entry and `gh pr view` succeeds for each

conditions.description: All PRs must be merged
conditions.check: `gh pr view --json state` returns 'MERGED' for all entries in pr_urls

conditions.description: Track file must be marked complete
conditions.check: Track file frontmatter has status: completed
